name: zo-hotline-calls
title: Zo Hotline Call Logs
description: Anonymous call patterns and escalation requests from the Zo Hotline advisory system. NO PII stored - patterns only.

sources.name: vapi_webhook
sources.description: VAPI webhook integration for Zo Hotline calls

privacy.description: NO personal information stored. Only topic patterns, duration, and assessment levels.
privacy.pii_policy: All personally identifiable information is excluded from logging. Names and phone numbers are never stored in the calls table.
privacy.escalation_policy: Escalations table contains contact info solely for V's follow-up, with explicit caller consent.
